recommendations.title: Taxi for Tobruk
recommendations.overview: During World War II, French Commandos join forces with a German officer in order to survive the African desert.

recommendations.title: Lion of the Desert
recommendations.overview: Resistance leader Omar Mukhtar opposes Italian colonization before World War II. The brutal guerrilla war against Italian General Rodolfo Graziani and the Fascist forces of Benito Mussolini highlights the struggle for Libyan independence and the hars

recommendations.title: November
recommendations.overview: In a poor Estonian village, a group of peasants use magic and folk remedies to survive the winter, and a young woman tries to get a young man to love her.

recommendations.title: A Time for Drunken Horses
recommendations.overview: After their father dies, a family of five children are forced to survive on their own in a Kurdish village on the border of Iran and Iraq.

recommendations.title: The Railway Children Return
recommendations.overview: Follow a group of children who are evacuated to a Yorkshire village during the Second World War, where they encounter a young soldier who, like them, is far away from home.

recommendations.title: Waltz with Bashir
recommendations.overview: An Israeli film director interviews fellow veterans of the 1982 invasion of Lebanon to reconstruct his own memories of his term of service in that conflict.

recommendations.title: Winter in Wartime
recommendations.overview: During World War II in the freezing winter of 1944-45 the western Netherlands are in the grip of a famine. Many people move east to provide for their families. Fourteen year old Michiel can't wait to join the Dutch resistance, to the dismay of his fa

recommendations.title: Chainsaw Man - The Movie: Reze Arc
recommendations.overview: In a brutal war between devils, hunters, and secret enemies, a mysterious girl named Reze has stepped into Denji's world, and he faces his deadliest battle yet, fueled by love in a world where survival knows no rules.

recommendations.title: WILL
recommendations.overview: Two young police officers find themselves torn between collaboration and resistance as they navigate the Nazi-occupied Antwerp during World War II.

recommendations.title: Little Sister
recommendations.overview: After returning to her childhood home, young nun Colleen finds her old room exactly how she left it: painted black and covered in goth and metal posters. Her parents are happy enough to see her, but her brother is living as a recluse in the guesthous
